series_title_en: CBT Core for Children — Stage 1: Emotions & Body

items.therapeutic_goal: Identify and name current feelings using child-friendly choices.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child needs help noticing and naming feelings.
items.ai_matching_summary: Notice the main feeling, where it shows up, and one thing happening right now.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.title_en: What Is My Body Telling Me?
items.therapeutic_goal: Connect body clues to emotions and internal states.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child needs help noticing body signals linked to emotions.
items.ai_matching_summary: Identify body signals, body locations, and one strong clue the child notices.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Rate feeling intensity and choose matching supports.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child needs to show how big a feeling is right now.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use a 1–5 ladder to rate the size of the feeling and choose what may help.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Notice early warning signs before feelings grow bigger.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child is learning to recognize early clues in body or behavior.
items.ai_matching_summary: Circle early clues, what may be happening, and note the first clue noticed today.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Teach that feelings can shift with time and support.
items.when_to_use: Use after a hard feeling begins to settle or when teaching hope and flexibility.
items.ai_matching_summary: See how feelings change from first to now to after some help, and what helped a little.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Create a simple personal card linking feelings, body clues, supports, and kind words.
items.when_to_use: Use as a quick take-away tool for daily emotional check-ins.
items.ai_matching_summary: Choose the feeling, body clues, helpful tools, and a kind phrase to remember.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.
